label: PASS
rationale: Locking_Range1 is preconfigured with RangeStart 0, and the Admin-readable Get ACL covers RangeStart; returning column 3 as 0 is compliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: Before any Locking table Set, Locking_Range1 RangeStart remains the Opal preconfigured value 0; returning 80 is not compliant.

label: PASS
rationale: Locking_Range1 is preconfigured with RangeLength 0, and the Admin-readable Get ACL covers RangeLength; returning column 4 as 0 is compliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: Before any Locking table Set, Locking_Range1 RangeLength remains the Opal preconfigured value 0; returning 8 is not compliant.

label: PASS
rationale: The later successful Set changed RangeStart to 120, and successful Set applies all parameterized changes; Get returning column 3 as 120 is compliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: The later successful Set changed RangeStart from 80 to 120, and all successful Set changes must be made; returning the old value 80 is not compliant.

label: PASS
rationale: The later successful Set changed RangeLength to 12, and successful Set applies all parameterized changes; Get returning column 4 as 12 is compliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: The later successful Set changed RangeLength from 8 to 12, and all successful Set changes must be made; returning the old value 8 is not compliant.

label: PASS
rationale: The later successful Set changed ReadLockEnabled to false, and the Admin-readable Get ACL covers that column; returning false is compliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: The later successful Set changed ReadLockEnabled from true to false, and all successful Set changes must be made; returning true is not compliant.

label: PASS
rationale: The later successful Set changed WriteLockEnabled to true, and the Admin-readable Get ACL covers that column; returning true is compliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: The later successful Set changed WriteLockEnabled from false to true, and all successful Set changes must be made; returning false is not compliant.
